concerns.text: FR-001 contains a malformed exponent notation: 'first $^{10}$ primes'. This likely intends '$10^{10}$' (ten billion) based on the User Story 1 context and Idea Md, but the current syntax is mathematically ambiguous and syntactically broken.

FR-003 contains a malformed exponent notation: 'windows of length $W \approx ^6$'. This likely intends '$10^6$' based on User Story 2 and the Idea Md, but the current syntax is broken and lacks the base number.
